title: Pabellón Criollo Sandwich
description: A Venezuelan-inspired sandwich featuring shredded beef, plantains, and melted cheese, served on crusty ciabatta bread.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Season the shredded beef with savory seasoning and salt.
Grill the beef for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked to 160°F (71°C).
Meanwhile, sauté the sliced plantains in a skillet until caramelized and tender.
Assemble the sandwiches by spreading a layer of plantains on the bottom slice of bread.
Add a layer of shredded beef on top of the plantains.
Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese over the beef.
Top with the remaining slice of bread.
